item.title: Bio
item.description: Hey! My name is Sourajit Karmakar. I am a 12th grader and I have deep interest in hardware, software, and more importantly ‘Android’. I also love photography, cooking and music. I am an aspiring software developer. I’m a member and contributer of StatiXOS; a custom AOSP ROM. Nice to meet you! Sourajit Karmakar

item.title: Contact Me
item.description: I’m usually available in Telegram and in the StatiXOS Public Chat. You can checkout my LinkedIn profile right here For anything else, you can [email](mailto: sourajit.karmakar@gmail.com)me.
